summary: Route-based corridor POI search feature testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified: corridor POI search triggers on route start, 'Along Route' panel displays POIs with distance in miles, POIs are clickable. Console shows '[Corridor] Sampling 30 points along 746mi route'. Total POI count increased from ~183 to 377.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/discover endpoint works with radius parameter (16km corridor)
VERIFIED: POST /api/browse endpoint works for truck categories (700-7600-0116,700-7600-0117,700-7600-0322,700-7900-0132)
VERIFIED: fetchCorridorPOIs function exists and is exported from geminiService.ts (line 484)
VERIFIED: Console shows '[Corridor] Sampling 30 points along 746mi route' when route is active
VERIFIED: 'Along Route' header displays instead of 'Upcoming POIs' (line 4629 in NavigationView.tsx)
VERIFIED: Along Route panel shows POIs with distance in miles (e.g., '4.0 mi', '18.0 mi')
VERIFIED: POIs in Along Route panel are clickable and open POI popup
VERIFIED: Along Route panel filters POIs within 10mi of route line (corridorDist < 10 check at line 3653)
VERIFIED: Corridor POIs increase total POI count (from ~183 to 377 - exceeds 300+ target)
VERIFIED: Deduplication by position works correctly (4-decimal precision)

discover_api.test_discover_returns_truck_stops: PASS - returns truck stops with position data
discover_api.test_discover_items_have_distance: PASS - all items have distance field

browse_api.test_browse_with_truck_categories: PASS - returns POIs for truck categories
browse_api.test_browse_items_have_position: PASS - all items have position data
browse_api.test_browse_items_have_categories: PASS - all items have category information

corridor_poi_logic.test_corridor_sampling_multiple_points: PASS - found POIs across sample points

frontend_ui.poi_distance_in_miles: PASS - distances shown as '4.0 mi', '18.0 mi', etc.
frontend_ui.poi_clickable: PASS - POI popup appears on click

seed_data_creation: None - used HERE API live data
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001. Vite+Express single-stack. Corridor POI search feature verified: 1) fetchCorridorPOIs() in geminiService.ts samples route points every ~25 miles, 2) Calls /api/discover (truck stop) + /api/browse (fuel/rest/weigh) at each sample with 16km radius, 3) Console shows '[Corridor] Sampling X points along Ymi route', 4) 'Along Route' panel replaces 'Upcoming POIs' header, 5) POIs filtered within 10mi of route line, 6) Total POI count increased from ~183 to 377. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_corridor_poi.py
